code.text: Coagulation

text.div:
Coagulation

Test11-MAR-2021Reference RangeUnit
Fibrin D-dimer FEU [Mass/volume] in Platelet poor plasma0.30 - 0.5ug/mL
Prothrombin time (PT)11.811.0 - 13.0s
INR in Platelet poor plasma by Coagulation assay1.4 H0.9 - 1.2{INR}

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows hypoxemia, anemia, leukopenia with neutropenia and lymphopenia, mild thrombocytopenia, elevated creatinine (suggesting renal impairment), hyperbilirubinemia, low total protein, elevated ferritin, and increased INR. These findings indicate multi-organ dysfunction, likely involving renal and hepatic impairment, with possible underlying infection or inflammation. Immediate clinical correlation and further evaluation are recommended.
